scripts.desktop:build: tauri build --bundles app && node scripts/fix-macos-bundle.mjs && node scripts/package-dmg.mjs
scripts.desktop:build:x86_64: PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/rustup/bin:$PATH" TAURI_ENV_TARGET_TRIPLE=x86_64-apple-darwin BUNDLE_ARCH=x86_64 CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="$PWD/third_party/taglib-x86_64" tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin --bundles app && PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/rustup/bin:$PATH" TAURI_ENV_TARGET_TRIPLE=x86_64-apple-darwin BUNDLE_ARCH=x86_64 CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="$PWD/third_party/taglib-x86_64" node scripts/fix-macos-bundle.mjs && TAURI_ENV_TARGET_TRIPLE=x86_64-apple-darwin BUNDLE_ARCH=x86_64 node scripts/package-dmg.mjs
